description_long: This is a compact, rectangular microwave oven with a predominantly white and light gray exterior. The front features a large, curved handle attached to a semi-transparent door, which is currently open, revealing the dark interior and a circular glass turntable. To the right of the door, there is a vertical control panel with two prominent rotary dials and several small buttons, all clearly labeled. The top and sides of the microwave have multiple rectangular ventilation slots for heat dissipation. The back panel is mostly flat with additional venting and a large information label. The overall design is modern and functional, suitable for placement in kitchens, break rooms, or urban communal spaces.
description: A modern white microwave oven with a curved handle, semi-transparent door, and a side control panel featuring dials and buttons. Ventilation slots are present on the top and sides.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open door with a curved handle, semi-transparent window, and the full control panel with dials and buttons.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the microwave, the open door's profile, and the top ventilation slots.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat back panel, additional vents, and a large information label.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the solid side panel and the open door's edge, with visible top vents.
attribute_brand_logo: A small brand logo is present below the control panel on the lower right front, printed in gray text.
attribute_control_panel_layout: The control panel is vertically aligned on the right side of the front face, featuring two large rotary dials stacked one above the other, with a row of small triangular buttons above them. Each dial and button is clearly labeled, and the panel is slightly recessed for easy access.
attribute_door_handle_design: The door handle is large, curved, and horizontally oriented, attached to the right edge of the door. It is made of molded plastic with a smooth finish, designed for an ergonomic grip.
attribute_vent_placement: Ventilation slots are located on the top surface in three rows and on the left side panel. The vents are rectangular and evenly spaced, providing airflow for cooling.
attribute_window_presence: A semi-transparent, curved rectangular window is present on the front door, allowing visibility into the microwave's interior.
